text: Found 1 file in the grafana observability stack that registers HTTP handlers without authentication middleware: sg-benchmarks/grafana-loki pkg/dataobj/explorer/service.go. The Handler() method registers 4 endpoints (/dataobj/api/v1/list, /dataobj/api/v1/inspect, /dataobj/api/v1/download, /dataobj/api/v1/provider) directly via mux.HandleFunc without wrapping in middleware.AuthenticateUser or equivalent. This contrasts with pkg/compactor/ui.go which correctly wraps its handler with middleware.Merge(middleware.AuthenticateUser, ...).
